text: The surgical team decided to insert an umbrella to support and unload the left ventricle.
Surgical technique, side biting aortic clamp and aortotomy.
and two-side anastomosis with 10 millimeter HEMA shield Dacron graft using 5-O proline
Tunneling and exit of the graft through second right intercostal space.
Preparation of the Impella LED Direct insertion of the Impella LED through the aortic valve under transesophageal echocardiography guidance
Umbilla LED insert should be 3.5 cm below the aortic valve.
Fixation of the Umbilla LED with the graft.
Uneventful and successful weaning from cardiopulmonary bypass.
Hemostasis and closure of the chest in the usual manner.
